proposed.title: Orientalism: Between Fact and Fantasy
proposed.description: This Met exhibition examines 19th-century European and Ottoman images of the East through painting, drawings, photographs, illustrated books, architecture, arms and armor, textiles, garments, glassware, ceramics, and metalwork, bringing together approximately 180 objects from across Met departments and outside loans.
